user.title: Source entities
user.description: Select the entities SEMS should read. SEMS never fetches data itself; it only reads these existing sensors.

data_description.price_entity: Using the core Nord Pool integration? Pick any of its sensors — which one doesn't matter, SEMS fetches the hourly prices itself. Using HACS Nord Pool, EnergyZero or similar? Pick the specific sensor that has the raw_today/raw_tomorrow attributes (check in Developer tools → States).
data_description.pv_forecast_entity: Pick any sensor of your solar forecast integration (Forecast.Solar, Solcast, ...) — which one doesn't matter, SEMS asks the integration for its hourly forecast the same way the Energy dashboard does. Leave empty if you have no solar panels.

settings.title: Prices and taxes
settings.description: The defaults work out of the box (Dutch 2026 tax values). Only change them if your contract differs. All settings can be changed later via Configure.

data.price_type: What kind of price does the source entity provide?

data_description.price_type: All-in: the price already includes taxes and VAT (most common). Raw: the bare market price, SEMS adds the taxes below.
data_description.supplier_markup: What your supplier charges per kWh on top of the market price.
data_description.energy_tax: The energy tax per kWh (Dutch 'energiebelasting'). Default is the Dutch 2026 value.
data_description.vat_percent: The VAT percentage applied to price, markup and tax.
data_description.export_fee: What exporting a kWh costs you ('terugleverkosten'). Exporting earns the bare market price minus this fee.
data_description.pv_capacity: Total peak power of your solar panels in Watts, e.g. 5000 for a 5 kWp system. Used to estimate how much of your consumption your own solar power covers per hour. 0 = automatic: assume the sunniest hour of the day covers it.
data_description.price_free_threshold: Below this all-in price, power counts as free: the score goes above 100 and the free-power sensor turns on.
data_description.debug_mode: Adds sensor.sems_diagnostics showing exactly what data SEMS found, so you can verify everything works. Turn off once you trust the numbers.

options.raw: Raw market price (SEMS adds taxes and VAT)
